mapper.select: SELECT service_cd as projectCd, workspace_cd as workspaceCd FROM servicegroup_meta WHERE csp_type = 'NCP' AND csp_account = #{memberNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT service_cd AS tbbNsId, mci_id AS tbbMciId, vm_id AS tbbVmId FROM servicegroup_meta WHERE csp_type = 'NCP' AND csp_instanceid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci = #{instanceNo} LIMIT 1
